# HELP pilot_xds_pushes Total number of XDS pushes
# TYPE pilot_xds_pushes counter
pilot_xds_pushes{type="cds"} 150
pilot_xds_pushes{type="eds"} 320
pilot_xds_pushes{type="lds"} 150
pilot_xds_pushes{type="rds"} 150
# HELP pilot_push_triggers Total number of push triggers
# TYPE pilot_push_triggers counter
pilot_push_triggers{type="endpoint"} 80
pilot_push_triggers{type="config"} 20
